content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.5.1–4.5.3 WARN — HomeKit is imported (`WallpaperGridView.swift:2`) and an `HMHomeManager()` is instantiated (`WallpaperGridView.swift:5`), but the app is a wallpaper browser with no home-automation UI (description.txt only mentions 4K wallpapers).
Pierre: Apple scrutinizes HomeKit usage because the entitlement grants access to sensitive home/accessory data, so a framework import with no visible home features may trigger review questions about why it's present. Here the `HMHomeManager` is created but never used to display or control any home accessories, which looks like an unused or misused entitlement. Verify whether HomeKit is actually needed; if not, remove the import and manager to avoid a 4.5.1–4.5.3 rejection.
